title: Persona
description: Search persona defining audience-specific content retrieval and AI behavior

slug.title: Slug
slug.description: Machine key used in query parameters and API calls (e.g. 'investor', 'hcp')

displayName.title: Display Name
displayName.description: Localized name shown in the search persona selector

description.title: Description
description.description: Localized tooltip or helper text for this persona

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: LLM system prompt prefix for this persona

searchBias.title: Search Bias
searchBias.description: Retrieval configuration (content types, tags, boost weights)

sortOrder.title: Sort Order
sortOrder.description: Display order in the persona selector
